text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
New Year's break is coming to a close soon. I
contact Tosen Jordan's homeroom teacher and
learn that she's already back from visiting her
family and is in the dorms.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I haven't heard from her yet, but there's always
the possibility she'll pop in once the break is over.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even if she doesn't come for training, she still has
to tell me whether she wants to continue training
or if she wants to quit.

text_block_list.name: Gyaru A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, let's go get our fortunes! I'm gonna keep
drawing 'em until I get a good one!

text_block_list.name: Gyaru B
text_block_list.text:
Isn't that cheating? What about you, Jordan? You
want one?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Oh, um... I think I'll pass...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: No way... Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I mean, Happy New Year. How've you been?
choice_data_list: That's what I wanted to ask you.
That's what I wanted to ask you.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Ah, right. Um... Sorry for ghosting you.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I've been, like... busy or whatever... But...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Oh... Right. Hopefully I can...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Anyways, what did you come to wish for? To meet
someone new?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Haha, that's not a bad idea, actually. Maybe I
should pray for someone to come sweep me off
my feet?
choice_data_list:
I'll pray for you to be able to run without any
injuries.

I'll pray for you to be able to run without any
injuries.

I'll pray that I can make you even better by the
next race!

I'll pray that I can make you even better by the
next race!

I'll pray that we'll find a new strategy for you to
use.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Haha, that's not a bad idea, actually. Maybe I
should pray for someone to come sweep me off
my feet?
choice_data_list:
I'll pray for you to be able to run without any
injuries.

I'll pray for you to be able to run without any
injuries.

I'll pray that I can make you even better by the
next race!

I'll pray that I can make you even better by the
next race!

I'll pray that we'll find a new strategy for you to
use.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I'm good. You should make a wish for yourself.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I mean, I'm in great shape. Thanks to... well,
because you made me run so much.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: What I mean is...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
You're actually really good. You should be aiming
bigger.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...I wonder if I can really get any better.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
You're such a go-getter, right? Don't you think
that energy's wasted on someone like me?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Like, maybe you should spend it on someone else.
You might feel a spark with them!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
You're actually really good. You should be aiming
bigger.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
You mean something other than really wanting to
win? Ahaha, that'd be nice.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Yeah... I wish I had something...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Anyways, what about you? I'm flattered, but
you're spending too much time daydreaming on
my behalf! ☆

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
You're actually really good. You should be aiming
bigger.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Then, once you're a big shot, I'll be able to brag
that I was your trainee.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: What?
choice_data_list: I'll be waiting as long as it takes.
I'll be waiting as long as it takes.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: What are you even saying?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Happy New Year, City! ...By the way, have
you seen Jordan?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
I haven't seen her training lately! If she's injured,
she's gonna be totes stressy depressy. I wanna go
see how she's doing!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Huh? I don't think she's injured. She's been
coming to class.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah? I wonder if something's troubling her...
I'll text her lat—

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Hold up. She hasn't gotten in touch with either of
you at all?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Nope.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Um, do you mind holding off on any messages?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Jordan is the kind of girl who always lets us know
she's okay, even when she's only out with a cold.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: But she hasn't texted anyone? That's kinda strange...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: ...Wait! You think she's avoiding us?

text_block_list.name: Gyaru A
text_block_list.text: Jordan! Suh, fam! ☆
